presets.label: Full bathroom remodel
presets.description: Tear-out to turnkey: demo, surfaces, fixtures, finish.

good.name: Good
good.desc: Quality stock fixtures and durable surfaces. A clean, solid bathroom built to last.

better.name: Better
better.desc: Upgraded tile, name-brand fixtures, and nicer lighting. The noticeable step up.

best.name: Best
best.desc: Custom tile work, premium fixtures, frameless glass. Magazine-page finish.

presets.label: Full kitchen remodel
presets.description: Cabinets, counters, surfaces, lighting, and finish.

good.name: Good
good.desc: Stock cabinets, quality laminate or entry stone counters, fresh surfaces throughout.

better.name: Better
better.desc: Semi-custom cabinets, quartz counters, tile backsplash, upgraded lighting.

best.name: Best
best.desc: Custom cabinetry, premium stone, designer fixtures and appliance-ready layout work.

presets.label: Flooring replacement
presets.description: Tear-out, prep, and new flooring across the measured area.

good.name: Good
good.desc: Quality LVP or carpet. Durable, water-resistant, family-proof.

better.name: Better
better.desc: Premium LVP, engineered hardwood, or tile in key areas.

best.name: Best
best.desc: Solid hardwood or large-format tile with upgraded prep and transitions.

presets.label: Basement finish
presets.description: Framing, insulation, drywall, flooring, lighting, and finish.

good.name: Good
good.desc: Clean finished space: framed, insulated, drywalled, painted, durable flooring.

better.name: Better
better.desc: Adds a finished ceiling system, upgraded flooring, and built-in lighting design.

best.name: Best
best.desc: Full living space: wet bar rough-in, premium finishes, custom built-ins.

presets.label: Interior repaint
presets.description: Walls, trim, and ceilings across the measured floor area.

good.name: Good
good.desc: Walls in quality washable paint, standard prep.

better.name: Better
better.desc: Walls plus trim and doors, upgraded prep and caulking.

best.name: Best
best.desc: Walls, trim, doors, and ceilings with premium paint and full surface repair.
